## Summary

Explain what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run`

If packaging, install flow, or release behavior changed:

- [ ] `pnpm verify:install-smoke`
- [ ] `pnpm verify:m003-install-path -- --check-only`

## Docs and release notes

- [ ] README or docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if this should ship in release notes

## Risks

Call out any platform-specific, runtime, or release risks.
